name: Governance Void Score
description: Measures unaddressed governance gaps across actor-role assignments and inactive rules.

name: Actor Onboarding Rate
description: Share of registered actors in Active status relative to total registered.

name: Concentration Risk Index
description: Degree to which critical dependencies concentrate on a single actor.

name: Platform Capability Maturity
description: Maturity of platform openness and orchestration capability.

name: Data Sovereignty Compliance
description: Compliance level of active data-related governance rules.

name: Relational Capital
description: Average trust level embedded across actor relationships.

name: Service Paradox Indicator
description: Gap between actor criticality and realized trust — a proxy for servitization value-capture friction.

name: Resilience Absorption
description: Ecosystem capacity to absorb shocks without governance failure, derived from redundancy and concentration.

name: Circular Closure Rate
description: Presence and strength of circularity-oriented actors and their dependency loops.

name: Actor Learning Rate
description: Composite of actor trust and authority as a proxy for governance learning absorption.
